summary: First-pass testing of Clinica: Kingdom of Healing. Backend: all 11 pytest tests PASSED (CRUD + validation + edge cases on /api/player). Frontend: onboarding (sage), player creation via POST /api/player, Run tab (player name/rank/XP/boss-locked/3 encounters), and Battle screen launch all work correctly. Pattern Sight reveal mechanic functional (stability rose 7% -> 55% after one full turn of skills). Battle did not complete to result screen within scripted loop; result screen flows not directly verified via UI. Tab navigation testIDs are missing on the tab bar.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK on create instead of conventional 201 Created. Functionally fine; consider 201.

integration_issues.issue: Could not reach result screen in scripted run. Battle outcome modal (battle-finish) never appeared after 8 looped turns; suspect more turns needed (Air Sprite corruption=80, sage starter dmg/turn is low) or stability dropped to 0 without modal firing. Needs deeper manual verification.
Tab bar items have no testIDs (tab-heroes, tab-codex, tab-kingdom, tab-profile not found). Hard to E2E test tab switching deterministically.

action_items: Add testID to each tab in (tabs)/_layout.tsx (tab-run, tab-heroes, tab-codex, tab-kingdom, tab-profile) so navigation can be automated.

Manually verify the full battle->result flow including XP and codex unlocks, since automated loop did not reach the outcome modal. Confirm the loss path (stability=0) also triggers the outcome modal (not just win).
Consider returning 201 from POST /api/player for semantic correctness.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_player: mastery branch uses 'isinstance(updates[mastery], dict) is False' - currently safe because Pydantic model_dump() already returns dict, so the elif-like coercion never runs. Code works but is dead/confusing; simplify.

Frontend store.tsx applyRewards increments runs_completed on every battle finish even when outcome was a loss - check if loss should also count as a run completed (currently applyRewards is only called on win, so OK).
All env vars properly sourced; no hardcoded URLs. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL used in /app/frontend/src/api/client (assumed).

success_rate.frontend: ~70% (onboarding, run-tab, battle-launch, skill-mechanics verified; result screen + tab nav not verified)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed players (guardian/sage/warden/weaver + edge cases) and cleaned up via DELETE /api/player/{id} fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/player CRUD verified. Onboarding-> tabs -> Run -> Battle works end-to-end. Outstanding: 1) reach result screen in automation (try a longer/looser turn loop or seed a player whose team has Strike-heavy heroes already owned so corruption drops faster); 2) re-test once tab testIDs added so Heroes/Codex/Kingdom/Profile screens can be auto-validated. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (NOT EXPO_BACKEND_URL).
rca_of_issue: N/A - no production bug found this iteration. Limited automation gap is on test-side (loop bound) and missing tab testIDs (small dev fix).
